title: hieracium praecox subsp. vernum
intro: Hieracium praecox subsp. vernum, commonly known as spring hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium praecox subsp. vernum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
